General.Name: Youxin Technology Ltd Class A Ordinary shares
General.Description: Youxin Technology Ltd operates as a cloud-based software as a service (SaaS) and platform as a service (PaaS) provider in Mainland China. Its cloud-based SaaS product and PaaS platform help retail enterprises digitally transform their businesses to develop, use, and control business applications. The company's products optimizes the overall supply chain by streamlining the decision-making process, efficiency, and profitability. It sells and markets its products directly to customers and third-party agents. The company was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, the People's Republic of China.
General.Address: No. 122 Huangpu Avenue West, Guangzhou, China

2.Name: Mr. Jinhou  Sun
2.Title: Chairman of Board of Directors & Co-Founder
